name: Cross-Agent Handoff
description: Agent B retrieves context stored by Agent A using scoped memory

seeds.content: Bug report: users experiencing 502 errors on the /api/billing endpoint during peak hours
Root cause: connection pool exhaustion. Max connections set to 10, need at least 50 for peak load
Fix applied: increased connection pool to 100, added connection timeout of 5 seconds
Private debug notes: tried increasing to 25 first but still saw intermittent failures

queries.query: what was the billing endpoint issue and how was it resolved
